name: Blameless
short_description: Blameless is a mysterious first-person adventure with primary focus on puzzle solving and short story. The player will appear in a role of an architect trying to investigate strange happenings, after discovering evidence of an act of violence.
detailed_description:
New game released

[/url]


About the Game

[b]Blameless[/b] is a 3D adventure focused on puzzle solving and story. Set in an unfinished house, the player is trying to escape a mysterious man. While you know how and why you got there, you could not foresee you were invited for a twisted purpose and it’s upto you to investigate what happened and how to get out. This is a short, yet full title with an open ending. Take around [b]20 to 60 minutes[/b] to complete. [h2]Blameless Is Free[/h2] Blameless is dedicated to the community! [h2]Gameplay Features[/h2] [b]Realistic[/b] puzzle solving [b]Investigative [/b]approach [b]Mysterious [/b]atmosphere [b]Alternative [/b]puzzle solutions Story progression via [b]exploration [/b] Character [b]voice over[/b] Element of [b]tension[/b


About the Game

Blameless is a 3D adventure focused on puzzle solving and story. Set in an unfinished house, the player is trying to escape a mysterious man. While you know how and why you got there, you could not foresee you were invited for a twisted purpose and it’s upto you to investigate what happened and how to get out.

This is a short, yet full title with an open ending. Take around 20 to 60 minutes to complete.

Blameless Is Free

Blameless is dedicated to the community!

Gameplay Features

Realistic puzzle solving
Investigative approach
Mysterious atmosphere
Alternative puzzle solutions
Story progression via exploration
Character voice over
Element of tension
